title: Is this a spin off
wikitext:
[]: Is this a spin-off?             Quote Post by Kaworu-chan » Sat May 15, 2010 12:03 am I found some pictures and it looks like some new Evangelion show. Mana is included in this series. If it is then is it only in Japan or will this soon be released in the U.S? http://www.evangelion-armageddon.com/Galerie/Shinji/Shinji105.jpg http://www.evangelion-armageddon.com/Galerie/Shinji/Shinji152.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Avatar of Dreams » Sat May 15, 2010 12:49 am They're from the Girlfriend of Steel/Iron Maiden game.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat May 15, 2010 8:22 am See also: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Girlfriend_of_Steel
